description: Architectural change required: adding replay protection (sequence numbers, nonces, timestamps) requires changes to the P7 message framing protocol and both client/server state machines. GCM/ChaCha20-Poly1305 modes already provide per-message uniqueness, but the base AES-256-SHA256 mode does not.
reason: Adding sequence numbers or nonce tracking requires protocol-level changes to the P7 binary format and synchronization on both client and server. This cannot be done with a minimal patch without breaking wire compatibility.
